title: Zorro, the Avenger
writer: Lowell S. Hawley, Johnston McCulley, Bob Wehling
actors: Guy Williams, Charles Korvin, Henry Calvin
plot: Compiled from six episodes of the original Disney Zorro series, this film has El Zorro, "The Fox," battling Jose Sebastian Varga, "The Eagle," a corrupt dictator set on taking control of all of Spanish California.
